title: KitchenCraft Sink Plug Hole/Overflow Cleaner Brush, 45.5 cm (18")
features: Don't stare forlornly at the stuff that's stuck down your plug hole. Grab this long sink brush and make your sink sparkle again
The long, thin design helps the brush to slip down tight gaps like plug holes and overflow slots, getting to those hard-to-reach areas
Strong and rigid so you can get a good scrub on, but with a gently flexible top section so it won't get stuck
The hardwearing bristles will catch hair, food and other gunk that lurks in your pipes, helping to maintain them and prevent blockages
This plug hole brush has a comfortable plastic handle with a hanging loop. It's 45.5 cm (18") long and comes with a 12 month guarantee
description: From the manufacturer The definitive kitchenware brand. KitchenCraft is the definitive kitchenware brand, with more than 1,300 everyday kitchen essentials to help you cook, bake and decorate. KitchenCraft Sink Overflow and Plug Hole Brush Few places are as gunk-prone and tricky to clean as plug holes and overflows. If only there was a magic wand you could wave to make it all sparkly clean again… Alakazam! Here’s KitchenCraft’s sink and overflow cleaning brush, which summons magical cleaning powers to tackle plug gunk, hair clumps and evil villains. OK, it’s not actually magic, and it won’t help you dispense with villains, but it *does* take a lot of the time and hassle out of cleaning your plumbing. With its long, thin design, it squeezes through small gaps (like plug and overflow slots), to get into tricky-to-reach areas. The brush is made of rigid wire, with sturdy bristles to scrub off the muck that wreaks havoc with your plumbing. It’s designed to flex just a little, though, so it can reach extra-tricky parts and won’t get stuck once it’s down there. Clumps of hair? Food waste? Grease and grime? Begone! Length (inc. handle): 45.5 cm (18") Brush length: 23.5 cm (9½") Brush diameter: 1.5 cm (½") Hand-wash only Protect Your Plumbing (and Save Cash!) We probably only notice what a tough job our plug holes, pipes and overflow slots have when something finally goes wrong. But when there’s a blockage, bad smell or nasty backup to deal with, you certainly can’t ignore it! Show your plugs and overflows some love with this great-value cleaning brush. By maintaining your plugs and pipes, you might even save yourself the hassle and cost of a plumber, so it’s a total win-win situation. The Tech Spec: Long, thin design This slender brush will fit through tight gaps to reach all of the nooks and crannies that are sometimes too hard to reach. Perfect for plug holes and overflow slots. Hardy bristles The hardy bristles will tackle strands of hair, food waste and build-ups of grease and slime, so you can get keep your sink looking shiny (and your pipes unblocked!). Snug, easy-store handle The handle is made of robust plastic and shaped to fit your hand, for fuss-free, comfortable cleaning. It has a hanging loop too, so you can keep this handy brush hung up in your kitchen or utility room. About KitchenCraft The definitive kitchenware brand. Since 1850, KitchenCraft has designed, manufactured and supplied thousands of cooking utensils, tools and gadgets, each playing an important role in the kitchens of customers across the UK. With more than 1,000 products to choose from, there’s always a KitchenCraft product you can rely on - from essentials for every day to the exceptional.
